log_entries.thought_preview: The sample is a PE32 executable with GUI capabilities, and it has been analyzed in multiple sandboxes. The tags suggest that it is a spreader with runtime modules, persistence capabilities, and an ove

The sample has made 3 unique IP connections, 6 unique domain connections, and 7 HTTP conversations. It has dropped 2 files and created 3 processes. The highlighted API call is SetFileTime, which could

The sample exhibits various capabilities, including encryption using RC4 KSA, delayed execution, and access to the Windows event log. It also contains a resource section and references analysis tool s

The sample has made DNS lookups for carder.bit, ipv4bot.whatismyipaddress.com, ns1.wowservers.ru, ns2.wowservers.ru, and ransomware.bit. It has also made HTTP GET requests to carder.bit, ipv4bot.whati

The sample has created two persistence keys in the registry, one in HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\RunOnce and another in \REGISTRY\MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Ru
The sample has dropped two files, fulehj.exe and dqbing.exe, in the AppData\Roaming\Microsoft directory and the current working directory, respectively.

The sample has created three processes, nslookup.exe, nslookup.exe, and nslookup.exe. It has also loaded several notable modules, including api-ms-win-security-lsalookup-l1-1-0.dll, api-ms-win-securit
